originalTitle: Portable RL models in C for WASM
title: Implementing and Testing C Neural Network Layers for Web Assembly RL Inference
summary: Developed C implementations of linear, LSTM, convolution, activation, one-hot, concatenation, and multi-discrete argmax layers, matching PyTorch outputs exactly. Wrote automated tests and structured the code into a portable library (puffer-net) for compiling to WebAssembly, enabling RL model inference in-browser.
